title: Warm up
content: The slide features images of three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, viewed from inside vehicles, providing different perspectives of urban life.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide showcases images representing modern and traditional China, emphasizing a ride through its cultural and urban landscape.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This session focuses on investigating and researching city features, development strategies, and their positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide pairs each city with a corresponding development strategy, highlighting Beijing's technology integration, Chongqing's sustainability, and Hangzhou's economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: Taxi drivers' perspectives highlight key urban strategies: sustainable development, economic growth, and technology integration in different cities.
